prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖北省物理类最低录取位次分别约1031名、853名、658名、3901名、2602名。2021–2023年位次持续前移（从1031升至658），2024年因选科要求调整（再选科目从化学/生物2选1变为仅化学）导致位次大幅后移至3901名，2025年回升至2602名，近两年波动剧烈，整体呈后移趋势；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为16人，2024年骤降至6人，2025年回升至19人；2026年计划28人，较2025年扩招约47.4%。大幅扩招将显著缓解竞争压力，推动最低录取位次后移（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第5位（2026年），复旦大学上海医学院共享复旦大学整体声誉与学科实力，属国内顶尖医学院校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风类舆情事件；但2025年声誉评价偏正面（科研成果类），抖音热度总排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极高，反映社会关注度持续居高。历史投档异常方面，2022年复旦大学在河南曾出现投档线暴跌，但湖北省未出现明显断档记录；复旦大学（含上海医学院）第五轮学科评估中，临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、护理学A-、药学A，医学类学科实力全国顶尖。招生专业中临床医学（8年制/5年制）对应临床医学A，药学对应药学A，预防医学对应公共卫生与预防医学A+，口腔医学对应口腔医学（复旦整体A-）。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高热（2024年，推荐），口腔医学推荐，药学/护理学偏热。湖北省2025年物理类考生约249,802人，2026年总考生393,700人，按近年物理类占比约63.85%估算，2026年物理类考生约251,377人，较2025年微增约0.6%，竞争略有加剧但幅度有限。；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，湖北省属跨省报考。该校在湖北省招生计划从2024年的6人增至2026年的28人，扩招幅度显著，体现对湖北生源的重视。上海作为一线城市对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（19→28人，+47.4%）对位次后移的显著推动作用，以及湖北省物理类考生微增（约+0.6%）、学校声誉偏负面、抖音高热关注度等多因素权衡，扩招效应占主导。在，考虑考生规模微增和声誉因素做小幅修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约3292名，区间2897–3687名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（8年制正谊明道班）
- 临床医学（5年制含卓越临床医师班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（含卓越口腔医师班）
- 临床医学（5年制，专业代码07）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班等）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班）
- 护理学（含护理学卓越班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2897–3687名内，建议以二档专业（口腔医学、临床医学5年制）为主攻方向，一档专业（临床医学8年制）作为冲刺，三档专业（药学、预防医学、护理学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<2897名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>3687名）建议以三档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category in Hubei Province were approximately 1031, 853, 658, 3901, and 2602 respectively. Rankings moved forward continuously from 2021 to 2023 (from 1031 to 658). In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (changing from a choice between Chemistry and Biology to only Chemistry), the ranking significantly dropped to 3901. In 2025, it rebounded to 2602, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years with an overall backward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province's Physics Category: 16 students each year from 2021 to 2023, sharply dropping to 6 in 2024, then rising to 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28 students, an increase of about 47.4% compared to 2025. The significant expansion will greatly alleviate competition pressure, pushing the minimum admission ranking backward (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College shares the overall reputation and academic strength of Fudan University, belonging to the top tier of domestic medical schools. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and style. However, in 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat positive (related to scientific research achievements), with a total ranking of 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), and extremely high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high social attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, Fudan University experienced a sharp drop in admission scores in Henan, but no obvious gaps were recorded in Hubei Province. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) achieved Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, with medical disciplines ranking top nationally. Among the enrollment majors, Clinical Medicine (8-year/5-year) corresponds to Clinical Medicine A, Pharmacy corresponds to Pharmacy A, Preventive Medicine corresponds to Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, and Stomatology corresponds to Stomatology (Fudan overall A-).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine remains highly popular (2024, recommended), Stomatology is recommended, and Pharmacy/Nursing are relatively popular. In 2025, Hubei Province had approximately 249,802 Physics Category examinees, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is 393,700. Estimating based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63.85%, the 2026 Physics Category examinees are about 251,377, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025, indicating a minor intensification of competition but limited in scope. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, and Hubei Province is a cross-province application. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province increased from 6 students in 2024 to 28 in 2026, a significant expansion, reflecting the importance placed on Hubei students. Shanghai, as a first-tier city, continues to attract examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in 2026 (19 to 28 students, +47.4%) which strongly pushes rankings backward, along with the slight increase in Hubei Physics Category examinees (about +0.6%), the somewhat negative university reputation, and high Douyin attention, the expansion effect dominates. After minor adjustments for the increase in examinee numbers and reputation factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 3292, with a range of 2897 to 3687.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year including Outstanding Clinical Physician Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (including Outstanding Stomatologist Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year, major code 07)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy Top Talent Class, etc.)
- Preventive Medicine (including Preventive Medicine Top Talent Class)
- Nursing (including Nursing Excellence Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2897 to 3687, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine 5-year) as the main target, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, Nursing) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<2897), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>3687), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors.
